description: A stylized retro-illustration graphic in pink and teal tones showing a young man in an orange hard hat and pink shirt looking to the side. A diagonal banner at upper right reads 'HUGE NEWS!', a starburst badge in the center reads 'THANKS TO THE OBBB!', and large text across the bottom reads 'PELL GRANTS... FOR THE TRADES!'.
notable_text: HUGE NEWS!; THANKS TO THE OBBB!; PELL GRANTS... FOR THE TRADES!
